entities.name: CHICKPEA
entities.description: A grain legume (Cicer arietinum) that is a rich source of proteins and can fix atmospheric nitrogen.

entities.name: GENOME SEQUENCING
entities.description: The process of determining the complete DNA sequence of an organism's genome.

entities.name: RESEQUENCING
entities.description: The process of sequencing multiple individuals of the same species to identify genetic variation.

entities.name: CLASSICAL GENETICS
entities.description: The study of heredity and variation in organisms through traditional breeding and crossing.

entities.name: CYTOGENETICS
entities.description: The study of inheritance in relation to the structure and function of chromosomes.

entities.name: TRAIT MAPPING
entities.description: The process of identifying the location of a gene associated with a specific trait on a chromosome.

entities.name: GENOME ANALYSIS
entities.description: The comprehensive study of the genome to understand genetic structure and function.

entities.name: CLIMATE CHANGE
entities.description: Rapid changes in global climate patterns affecting agriculture.

entities.name: ARABLE LAND
entities.description: Land capable of being ploughed and used to grow crops.

entities.name: DEVELOPING COUNTRIES
entities.description: Regions with lower industrialization and economic development.

entities.name: CLIMATE SMART CROPS
entities.description: Crops developed to be resilient to climate change and provide food security.

entities.name: CEREALS
entities.description: Grass crops grown for their edible grains.

entities.name: GRAIN LEGUMES
entities.description: Plants in the legume family grown for their dry seeds.

entities.name: PROTEIN CONTENT
entities.description: The amount of protein present in the crop.

entities.name: ATMOSPHERIC NITROGEN
entities.description: Nitrogen gas in the air that can be fixed for plant use.

entities.name: RHIZOBIA
entities.description: Soil bacteria that form symbiotic relationships with legumes to fix nitrogen.

entities.name: ABIOTIC STRESS
entities.description: Non-living environmental factors that negatively impact plant growth.

entities.name: DROUGHT
entities.description: A prolonged period of abnormally low rainfall leading to water shortage.

entities.name: HEAT
entities.description: High temperature stress affecting plant productivity.

entities.name: SALINITY
entities.description: High salt concentration in soil affecting plant growth.

entities.name: BIOTIC STRESS
entities.description: Living organisms that negatively impact plant health.

entities.name: FUSARIUM WILT
entities.description: A fungal disease causing wilting in plants.

entities.name: ASCOCHYTA BLIGHT
entities.description: A fungal disease affecting legumes.

entities.name: BOTRYTIS GREY MOULD
entities.description: A fungal disease causing grey mould on plants.

entities.name: SEMI-ARID REGIONS
entities.description: Regions characterized by low and irregular rainfall.
